{{Infobox location
| name = Akura vault
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura vault]] contains [[natural treasures]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura vault]] is a location with a [[gate]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura vault]] is an enormous interior that extends into a mountain.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura vault]] is difficult to break.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
